primary_site.evidence: CT-guided percutaneous biopsy of the right lower lobe mass reveals moderately to poorly differentiated adenocarcinoma

cancer_category.evidence: adenocarcinoma, solid predominant pattern with focal mucinous features

overall_stage_at_diagnosis.evidence: Stage IIIB EGFR L858R-mutant adenocarcinoma with chest wall invasion. Unresectable.

t_stage_at_diagnosis.evidence: right lower lobe mass...5.8 cm...chest wall invasion. Unresectable. Tumor invades visceral pleura. A 5.8 cm tumor with chest wall invasion is consistent with T4.

n_stage_at_diagnosis.evidence: Mediastinal lymphadenopathy decreased (post-treatment). Stage IIIB with T4 is consistent with N2 or N3. Mediastinal lymphadenopathy suggests at least N2.

m_stage_at_diagnosis.evidence: No distant metastases. Stage IIIB excludes M1 disease.

histology.value: adenocarcinoma, moderately to poorly differentiated, solid predominant pattern with focal mucinous features
histology.evidence: moderately to poorly differentiated adenocarcinoma, solid predominant pattern with focal mucinous features

biomarker_alk.evidence: No ALK, ROS1, BRAF, MET, RET, or KRAS alterations

biomarker_ros1.evidence: No ALK, ROS1, BRAF, MET, RET, or KRAS alterations

biomarker_braf.evidence: No ALK, ROS1, BRAF, MET, RET, or KRAS alterations

biomarker_met.evidence: No ALK, ROS1, BRAF, MET, RET, or KRAS alterations

biomarker_ret.evidence: No ALK, ROS1, BRAF, MET, RET, or KRAS alterations

biomarker_kras.evidence: No ALK, ROS1, BRAF, MET, RET, or KRAS alterations

regimen_1_drug_list.evidence: initiate concurrent chemoradiation followed by consolidation osimertinib

regimen_1_start_date.evidence: No specific date provided for chemoradiation start

regimen_2_drug_list.evidence: Start consolidation osimertinib 80 mg daily per LAURA trial paradigm for EGFR-mutant Stage III NSCLC after chemoradiation

regimen_2_start_date.evidence: No specific calendar date provided for osimertinib start. Notes say 'Start consolidation osimertinib' after chemoradiation completion.

regimen_2_end_date.evidence: Continue osimertinib indefinitely. Surveillance imaging per protocol.

radiation_1_type.evidence: concurrent chemoradiation...Discuss with radiation oncology. Post-radiation fibrotic changes noted. Standard concurrent chemoradiation for stage III NSCLC uses external beam radiation.

radiation_1_site.evidence: Post-radiation fibrotic changes noted in right lower lobe. Concurrent chemoradiation for right lower lobe mass with mediastinal lymphadenopathy.

radiation_1_start_date.evidence: No specific date provided for radiation start

burden_1_assessor_type.evidence: CT chest/abdomen/pelvis after completion of chemoradiation shows decrease in right lower lobe mass from 5.8 cm to 3.2 cm

burden_1_type.evidence: decrease in right lower lobe mass from 5.8 cm to 3.2 cm. Mediastinal lymphadenopathy decreased. No distant metastases. Partial response.

burden_1_detail.value: partial response; mass decreased from 5.8 cm to 3.2 cm
burden_1_detail.evidence: decrease in right lower lobe mass from 5.8 cm to 3.2 cm...Partial response.

burden_2_assessor_type.evidence: Restaging CT at 3 months on consolidation osimertinib shows stable residual right lower lobe lesion measuring 2.8 cm

burden_2_type.evidence: stable residual right lower lobe lesion measuring 2.8 cm. Post-radiation fibrotic changes noted. No new disease.

burden_2_detail.value: stable disease; residual 2.8 cm at 3 months on osimertinib
burden_2_detail.evidence: Restaging CT at 3 months on consolidation osimertinib shows stable residual right lower lobe lesion measuring 2.8 cm

burden_3_assessor_type.evidence: CT at 6 months shows continued stability. Right lower lobe residual 2.6 cm

burden_3_type.evidence: CT at 6 months shows continued stability. Right lower lobe residual 2.6 cm with surrounding fibrosis. No evidence of progression or distant metastases.

burden_3_detail.value: stable disease; residual 2.6 cm at 6 months
burden_3_detail.evidence: Right lower lobe residual 2.6 cm with surrounding fibrosis. No evidence of progression or distant metastases.

burden_4_assessor_type.evidence: MRI brain at 6 months shows no intracranial metastatic disease

burden_4_type.evidence: MRI brain at 6 months shows no intracranial metastatic disease

burden_4_detail.value: no intracranial metastatic disease on brain MRI
burden_4_detail.evidence: MRI brain at 6 months shows no intracranial metastatic disease

burden_5_assessor_type.evidence: CT at 9 months shows stable right lower lobe post-treatment changes

burden_5_type.evidence: CT at 9 months shows stable right lower lobe post-treatment changes. No new nodules or lymphadenopathy. No distant metastases.

burden_5_detail.value: stable disease at 9 months; no new nodules or lymphadenopathy
burden_5_detail.evidence: stable right lower lobe post-treatment changes. No new nodules or lymphadenopathy. No distant metastases.

burden_6_assessor_type.evidence: CT at 12 months shows right lower lobe residual stable at 2.5 cm

burden_6_type.evidence: CT at 12 months shows right lower lobe residual stable at 2.5 cm. Post-radiation fibrosis. No new disease. Ongoing stable disease.

burden_6_detail.value: stable disease; residual 2.5 cm at 12 months
burden_6_detail.evidence: right lower lobe residual stable at 2.5 cm. Post-radiation fibrosis. No new disease. Ongoing stable disease.

burden_7_assessor_type.evidence: PET/CT at 15 months shows low-grade FDG uptake in the right lower lobe residual (SUV max 2.8)

burden_7_type.evidence: low-grade FDG uptake in the right lower lobe residual (SUV max 2.8), likely post-treatment changes. No FDG-avid disease elsewhere. No evidence of recurrence.

burden_7_detail.value: no evidence of recurrence; low-grade FDG uptake SUV max 2.8 likely post-treatment
burden_7_detail.evidence: low-grade FDG uptake in the right lower lobe residual (SUV max 2.8), likely post-treatment changes. No FDG-avid disease elsewhere. No evidence of recurrence.

categorical_smoking_history.evidence: COPD stable (mentioned in clinical progress note at 6 months). COPD is strongly associated with smoking history. No explicit smoking statement found.
